title: Service-Layer Integration Tests with Real Database

tasks.title: Verify SPEC-080 bootstrap baseline runs green
tasks.description: Run the existing service-core integration suite end-to-end to confirm the bootstrap from commit 76226948f is healthy before extending it. Steps: (1) `pnpm db:start` to bring up PostgreSQL; (2) `pnpm --filter @repo/service-core test:integration`; (3) confirm both `accommodation.integration.test.ts` and `user-bookmark.integration.test.ts` pass against the ephemeral `hospeda_service_integration_test` DB; (4) confirm `closeServiceTestPool()` releases the pool with no hanging processes. Test requirement: no new tests; this task is a baseline gate. If anything fails, fix before proceeding (likely root cause: SPEC-061 schema drift, missing extras, or pool teardown).

subtasks.title: Verify pool closes cleanly (no hanging Node processes)

tasks.title: Mark SPEC-080 status from draft to in-progress
tasks.description: Update the spec frontmatter at `.claude/specs/SPEC-080-service-integration-tests/spec.md` line 3 from `Status: draft` to `Status: in-progress`. Update `.claude/tasks/index.json` to add SPEC-080 entry with progress `0/22` and status `in-progress`. Test requirement: none (administrative).

tasks.title: Add seedPost helper to integration helpers
tasks.description: Extend `packages/service-core/test/integration/services/helpers.ts` with `seedPost(tx, overrides?)` that inserts a User (author) + Post and returns `{ authorId, postId }`. Follow the same pattern as `seedAccommodation`/`seedUserBookmark`: use `crypto.randomUUID()` for IDs, add a unique short suffix to slugs, set `lifecycleState: 'ACTIVE'`, satisfy NOT NULL constraints. Inspect `packages/db/src/schemas/post.schema.ts` for required columns (title, slug, summary, content, category, etc). Test requirement: helper is exercised in T-011 and T-018 — no dedicated unit test needed; correctness verified by downstream test pass.

subtasks.title: Inspect posts schema for required NOT NULL columns
Implement seedPost(tx, overrides?) returning { authorId, postId }

tasks.title: Add seedEvent helper to integration helpers
tasks.description: Extend `helpers.ts` with `seedEvent(tx, overrides?)` that inserts User (author) + Destination (required FK from EventLocation) + EventLocation + EventOrganizer + Event + Tag + r_entity_tag join row. Returns `{ authorId, destinationId, locationId, organizerId, eventId, tagId }`. EventService loads `author`, `location`, `organizer`, AND `tags`. The tags m2m goes through `r_entity_tag` (composite PK on tagId+entityId+entityType), entityType=`EVENT`. Test requirement: exercised by T-012; correctness verified there.

subtasks.title: Inspect event, eventLocation, eventOrganizer, tag schemas
Identify events↔tags join table name and columns
Implement seedEvent inserting all 5 entities + join row

tasks.title: Add seedAccommodationReview helper to integration helpers
tasks.description: Extend `helpers.ts` with `seedAccommodationReview(tx, overrides?)` that reuses the seedAccommodation FK chain (User + Destination + Accommodation) and adds an AccommodationReview row referencing that user and accommodation. Returns `{ userId, destinationId, accommodationId, reviewId }`. The `rating` column is a NOT NULL jsonb with shape `AccommodationRatingInput` (cleanliness, hospitality, services, accuracy, communication, location — all 0..5). Test requirement: exercised by T-013.

subtasks.title: Inspect accommodation_review schema for required fields

tasks.title: Add seedDestinationReview helper to integration helpers
tasks.description: Extend `helpers.ts` with `seedDestinationReview(tx, overrides?)` that inserts User + Destination + DestinationReview. Returns `{ userId, destinationId, reviewId }`. The `rating` jsonb has 18 required fields (landscape, attractions, accessibility, safety, cleanliness, hospitality, culturalOffer, gastronomy, affordability, nightlife, infrastructure, environmentalCare, wifiAvailability, shopping, beaches, greenSpaces, localEvents, weatherSatisfaction). Test requirement: exercised by T-014.

tasks.title: Add seedOwnerPromotion helper to integration helpers
tasks.description: Extend `helpers.ts` with `seedOwnerPromotion(tx, overrides?)` that reuses seedAccommodation FK chain and adds an OwnerPromotion referencing the owner User and the accommodation. Returns `{ ownerId, destinationId, accommodationId, promotionId }`. Required: slug (unique), ownerId, title, discountType (enum: percentage|fixed|free_night), discountValue, validFrom (timestamp). Test requirement: exercised by T-015.

tasks.title: Add seedSponsorshipPackage helper to integration helpers
tasks.description: Extend `helpers.ts` with `seedSponsorshipPackage(tx, overrides?)` that inserts SponsorshipLevel + SponsorshipPackage (the package references the level via `eventLevelId`). Returns `{ levelId, packageId }`. SponsorshipPackageService loads only `eventLevel`. Used target_type=`event`, tier=`standard` for the level. Test requirement: exercised by T-017 and reused by T-009 indirectly.

tasks.title: Add seedSponsorship helper to integration helpers
tasks.description: Extend `helpers.ts` with `seedSponsorship(tx, overrides?)` that reuses seedSponsorshipPackage chain (level + package), adds a sponsor User, and inserts a Sponsorship row referencing all three. Returns `{ sponsorId, levelId, packageId, sponsorshipId }`. SponsorshipService loads `sponsorUser`, `level`, `package`. Required: slug, sponsorUserId, targetType, targetId (uuid w/o FK constraint), levelId, startsAt. Test requirement: exercised by T-016.

subtasks.title: Inspect sponsorship schema and confirm FK column names
Insert sponsor User with permissive lifecycleState

tasks.title: Add seedPostSponsorship helper to integration helpers
tasks.description: Extend `helpers.ts` with `seedPostSponsorship(tx, overrides?)` that reuses seedPost (author User + Post), inserts a PostSponsor entity (NOT a User — discovered during impl, see schema note in helpers.ts JSDoc), and inserts a PostSponsorship row tying the post to the sponsor. By default updates `posts.sponsorshipId` to point at the new sponsorship so PostService.getById can resolve `data.sponsorship.sponsor` (nested). Returns `{ authorId, postId, sponsorId, sponsorshipId }`. **Discovery**: spec said 'sponsor User' but `post_sponsorships.sponsorId` actually FKs to `post_sponsors` (a brand entity with name, logo, contact, type=POST_SPONSOR), not `users`. Test requirement: exercised by T-011 (post nested) and T-018 (post-sponsorship direct).

subtasks.title: Inspect post_sponsorship schema for FK columns and required fields
Discovered: sponsor relation points to post_sponsors brand table, not users
Implement seedPostSponsorship reusing seedPost + PostSponsor + link
Update Post.sponsorshipId to enable nested sponsorship.sponsor

tasks.title: Write post.integration.test.ts (PostService getById, includes nested sponsorship.sponsor)
tasks.description: Created `packages/service-core/test/integration/services/post.integration.test.ts`. Validates the nested `sponsorship.sponsor` resolution that GAP-028 flagged. The nested PostSponsor resolves correctly. Discoveries during impl: (a) `sponsor` is a PostSponsor brand entity, not a User (already noted in T-010); (b) `service.getById` THROWS `ServiceError` on NOT_FOUND, it does not return `{ data: null, error }` — tests use `.rejects.toThrow(/not found/i)` instead.

subtasks.title: Inspect PostService getDefaultListRelations() to confirm relation names
Write happy-path test with full nested chain assertions
Write FK-consistency test for nested sponsorship.sponsor.id
Run test against live DB and confirm all 3 cases pass (GAP-028 guard green)

tasks.title: Write event.integration.test.ts (EventService getById)
tasks.description: Created `packages/service-core/test/integration/services/event.integration.test.ts`. Initially the service only loaded `{ organizer, location }`; widened to `{ author, organizer, location }` on closure to match SPEC-080's intent (the EventModel already supported it via validRelationKeys). **Schema gap surfaced**: `tags` cannot be eagerly loaded because `r_entity_tag` is polymorphic (entityType + entityId composite reference) and Drizzle's relational query API does not support polymorphic resolution. Tags must be loaded via a separate query — out of scope for SPEC-080 and documented in CLAUDE.md. Updated 3 unit tests in test/services/event/{event.service,getById}.test.ts to match the widened relations object.

subtasks.title: Discovered: bootstrap only loaded { organizer, location } — author missing
Discovered: tags cannot be eagerly loaded (polymorphic m2m)
Widen getDefaultListRelations to { author, organizer, location }
Update 3 unit-test expectations to match widened relations

tasks.description: Created `packages/service-core/test/integration/services/accommodation-review.integration.test.ts`. Validates user + accommodation relations populated. Both tests pass against live DB.

subtasks.title: Write happy-path test asserting user + accommodation relations

tasks.description: Created `packages/service-core/test/integration/services/destination-review.integration.test.ts`. Validates user + destination relations populated. Both tests pass against live DB.

tasks.title: Write owner-promotion.integration.test.ts (OwnerPromotionService getById)
tasks.description: Created `packages/service-core/test/integration/services/owner-promotion.integration.test.ts`. Validates owner + accommodation relations populated. Both tests pass against live DB.

tasks.title: Write sponsorship.integration.test.ts (SponsorshipService getById)
tasks.description: Created `packages/service-core/test/integration/services/sponsorship.integration.test.ts`. Validates sponsorUser + level + package relations populated. Both tests pass against live DB.

tasks.title: Write sponsorship-package.integration.test.ts (SponsorshipPackageService getById)
tasks.description: Created `packages/service-core/test/integration/services/sponsorship-package.integration.test.ts`. Validates eventLevel relation populated. Both tests pass against live DB.

tasks.title: Write post-sponsorship.integration.test.ts (PostSponsorshipService getById)
tasks.description: Created `packages/service-core/test/integration/services/post-sponsorship.integration.test.ts`. Validates post + sponsor (PostSponsor brand entity with type=POST_SPONSOR) relations populated. Both tests pass against live DB.

tasks.title: Wire @repo/service-core test:integration into turbo.json + root scripts
tasks.description: Verified existing wiring: turbo.json already declares `test:integration` as a generic task (cache: false, env: HOSPEDA_TEST_DATABASE_URL, dependsOn: ^build). Root package.json already exposes `pnpm test:integration` as `turbo run test:integration`. Confirmed via `turbo --dry-run` that `@repo/service-core#test:integration` is included in the run plan. No edits required.

subtasks.title: Inspect current turbo.json for test:integration task config
Verify root pnpm test:integration script invokes both packages
Run dry-run to confirm pipeline graph

tasks.title: Add service-core integration test step to .github/workflows/ci.yml
tasks.description: The existing CI step `pnpm test:integration` (line 148 ci.yml) already runs through turbo, which now picks up `@repo/service-core#test:integration` automatically (per T-019). No new step needed — adding a separate `pnpm --filter @repo/service-core test:integration` would have run the suite twice. Renamed the CI step from 'Run DB integration tests (SPEC-061)' to 'Run integration tests (SPEC-061 db + SPEC-080 service-core)' to reflect the broader scope.

subtasks.title: Locate existing DB integration step in ci.yml
Confirmed turbo orchestration covers service-core; no new step needed
Renamed step label to reflect SPEC-080 scope
Confirm Postgres service availability already provided by SPEC-061 setup

tasks.title: Document integration tests in packages/service-core/CLAUDE.md
tasks.description: Added `## Integration Tests (SPEC-080)` section to packages/service-core/CLAUDE.md covering prerequisites, commands, how it works, the NOT_FOUND throws-vs-returns contract, the EventService relations gap, the post_sponsorships.sponsor brand-vs-user discovery, and skip behavior. Inserted after `## Testing Services` and before `## Authorization & Permission Checks`.

subtasks.title: Add Integration Tests section to CLAUDE.md
Document schema discoveries (PostSponsor, Event relations gap)

tasks.title: Run full SPEC-080 integration suite end-to-end and close spec
tasks.description:
Final acceptance gate executed. (1) Integration suite: 10/10 files passing, 19/19 tests passing in 20.4s. (2) Pool teardown clean (DB dropped on global teardown). (3) Unit suite: integration files under test/integration/services/** are properly excluded from `pnpm test`. (4) Spec status moved to completed; index.json updated to 22/22. (5) Follow-up findings documented in CLAUDE.md and below — none of them blocked SPEC-080 closure.

Follow-ups discovered during SPEC-080 closure:
  • EventService.getDefaultListRelations() widened from { organizer, location } to { author, organizer, location } during closure (T-012). Tags remain excluded because r_entity_tag is polymorphic and Drizzle's relational query API cannot resolve it natively — documented in service-core/CLAUDE.md.
  • Pre-existing test failure in packages/service-core/test/billing/addon-limit-recalculation.test.ts (unrelated to SPEC-080, file not modified by this work).

subtasks.title: Run full integration suite and confirm 10/10 pass
Run unit suite and confirm integration files excluded
Document EventService relations gap as follow-up
